name: cluster-info-compare
description: Read HelloSpoke CRDs from OpenShift, store cluster version snapshots, and compare them over time

scripts.sync: node -e "require('./lib/sync').syncFromCluster().then(r => { console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2)); process.exit(0); }).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })"
